MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-05-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT TIFFANY SANDERS MOTION TO SEAL RECORDS AND REGISTER OF ACTIONS. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SEAL PURSUANT TO C R C 2.550 AND 2.551 MOTION TO SEAL RECORDS AND REGISTER OF ACTIONS IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO C C P SECTION 1161.2(5) AND ACCESS TO THE COURT'S RECORDS MAY ONLY BE AS PROVIDED IN PARAGRAPHS 1 THROUGH 4 OF SECTION 1161.2. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
